title: EDEN group
description: A named set of workers and/or other groups within an experiment. Membership resolves transitively; cycles MUST be rejected at write time per spec/v0/02-data-model.md §7.

name.description: OPTIONAL operator-supplied display label (spec/v0/02-data-model.md §1.7). Reserved group names (`admins`, `orchestrators`) MUST be rejected by `register_group` after setup-experiment's initial mint.

items.description: Member id — either a registered `worker_id` (wkr_*) or a `group_id` (grp_*) in the same experiment (spec/v0/02-data-model.md §1.6).

created_by.description: Actor identifier of the caller that created the group: the literal admin sentinel `admin` or a worker_id (spec/v0/02-data-model.md §1.6).
